rationale: Ukraine's continued offensive operations near Romania's border region remain the most relevant factor; no new qualitative shift beyond last cycle's refreshed baseline.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued advances and intensified logistics strikes are a continuation of last cycle's shift. For Romania on the Black Sea, the security environment remains elevated but stable — no new escalation.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS collapse: European defense autonomy questioned
top_events.summary: The collapse of the Franco-German fighter jet program raises concerns about European defense self-sufficiency, relevant to Romania as a NATO member on the eastern flank.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal stalemate continues
top_events.summary: No breakthrough in Iran-US nuclear talks; energy market uncertainty persists but no new shock affecting Romanian consumers.
